nasb.text: She quickly lowered her jar from her shoulder, and said, ‘Drink, and I will water your camels also’; so I drank, and she watered the camels also.

esv.text: She quickly let down her jar from her shoulder and said, ‘Drink, and I will give your camels drink also.’ So I drank, and she gave the camels drink also.

cnv.text: 她急忙從肩上拿下水瓶來，說：‘請喝，我還要給你的駱駝喝。’我喝了，她也打水給我的駱駝喝。

ccb.text: 她就连忙放下肩上的水罐，说，‘请喝，我也打水给你的骆驼喝。’我喝了，她又打水给骆驼喝。

csbs.text: 她急忙从肩上拿下罐子，说：‘请喝吧，我也给你的骆驼喝。’我就喝了；她又给我的骆驼喝了。
